CONTENT.Club career: Moțoc made his Serie C debut for Carpi on 3 March 2021, in a game against Legnago Salus.On 1 September 2021, Moțoc joined Salernitana, and he made his Serie A debut with the club on 15 January 2022, in 3–0 home defeat against Lazio.On 6 January 2023, Moțoc was sent on loan to Serie C side Siena until the end of the season, with option and counter-option to buy both included in the deal.On 23 August 2023, Moțoc moved on a new loan to Legnago.On 25 July 2024, he joined Athens Kallithea on permanent basis.

SUMMARY: Andrei Moțoc (born 13 April 2002) is a Moldovan professional footballer who plays as a defender for Greek Super League club Athens Kallithea.
